name: Raadr, Inc.
summary: Raadr, Inc. offers a software tool that allows individuals to monitor social media activity online. It provides RAADR, a software development and mobile application for social media monitoring, facial recognition, and to view private messages and browser history, as well as to get real time alerts. The company was formerly known as PITOOEY!, Inc. and changed its name to Raadr, Inc. in July 2015. Raadr, Inc. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona.
